blockers.detail: agents/src/trader/ does not exist. The trader CLI (trader scan, trader research) has not been implemented. This is Day 0 — the pipeline scaffold needs to be built before live scans can run.

yfinance 1.4.1 installed but all ticker requests returned HTTP 403 'Host not in allowlist'. The Claude Code on-web sandbox network policy blocks outbound requests to Yahoo Finance endpoints. Price data could not be fetched.

fallback: LLM_BACKEND=disabled TRADER_OFFLINE=1 stub (no pipeline to invoke)

components.confidence: thesis confidence score from LLM scan, normalized [0,1]
components.normalized_sizing_sigma: position-sizing signal magnitude normalized to [0,1] across the watchlist
components.recent_hit_rate: rolling 5-day directional hit rate for this ticker, normalized [0,1]
components.news_momentum: news_scout sentiment score normalized [0,1]; 0.5 when no data

next_actions: Implement agents/src/trader/ pipeline (orchestrator, schemas, CLI) so trader scan can run
Run in an environment with unrestricted outbound HTTP (local dev or GitHub Actions) to get real yfinance data
On first live run: populate confidence, sizing_sigma from LLM scan; populate news_momentum from news_scout
After 5 trading days: compute hit_rate; FOM becomes fully populated
